name: Service Point Solutions, S.A.
summary: Service Point Solutions, S.A. provides printing and document management services to companies worldwide. It offers integrated printing, scanning, and mailroom based solutions; and print products and related digital services. The company also offers managed services; and print management services that support branding, direct mail, promotions, point-of-sale, and market-related activities. In addition, it provides mail management and content management services; and Web2print, which provides control of ordering and costs of document assets. Service Point Solutions, S.A. was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Barcelona, Spain.
